code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut tok = ""
mut stopped = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  if stopped
    i = n
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            if v < 0
              stopped = true
            else
              sum = sum + v
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          tok = ""
        end
      else
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
end

if not stopped
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v < 0
        ()
      else
        sum = sum + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
